title: Her Waiting Face
content:
In some strange place
    Of long-lost lands he finds her waiting face -
    Comes marveling upon it, unaware,
    Set moonwise in the midnight of her hair.
meaning:
James Whitcomb Riley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Her Waiting Face"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
